libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native test/runtime system properties for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Tests should use a local Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 with an ephemeral port; no external Docker service is needed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient-related APIs reference the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency; avoid relying on OAuth2 coverage unless intentionally adding that optional dependency.
Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative for whether the Netty/JDK 25 workaround is sufficient.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Meaningful coverage is reachable with the normal Vert.x WebClient scaffold and an in-process HTTP server, but 5.0.1 pulls Netty 4.2.x and needs the existing JDK 25 native-run system-property workaround to avoid runtime failure.
